title: OR-ALERT - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT OR-ALERT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to local alerts, warnings, and notifications (AWN) systems for disaster situations and hazard information. Alerts are sent by official public safety and emergency management authorities at the local, county, tribal, and/or state level depending on the scope of the emergency. 3930 Fairview Industrial Drive SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (866) 436-4911 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (866) 436-4911 Technical Support [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to sign up for the local alert system FEES: Standard voice and text message rates may apply for certain types of notifications depending on your phone service provider DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Arabic, Chinese, English, Hindi, Hmong, Korean, Russian, Somali, Spanish, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Avalanche Warnings Cold Weather Advisories Drought Advisories Earthquake Advisories Evacuation Information Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings Fire Advisories Flood Advisories Freeze Warnings General Disaster Information Hazardous Materials Emergency Advisories High Tide Advisories High Wind Advisories Landslide/Mudslide Advisories Radiological Emergency Warnings Smog Alerts Terrorism Warnings Thunderstorm Advisories Tornado Advisories Tsunami Advisories Volcanic Eruption Advisories Winter Storm Advisories Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - LOCAL OFFICES OF EMERGENCY CONTACTS DISASTER SERVICES - OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT DISASTER SERVICES - STATE OF OREGON FLOOD DASHBOARD If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT
